end.

Um And far and I have been working with Morgan to kind of discuss if one of the additional services that they offer would be a good fit for the portfolio and we think that it would um you know, part of our monthly marketing calendar is we ask you guys to post to your Google Business pages twice a month.
Um And honestly, it's probably not even enough times to, to be posting.
And so, um we have put together this new partnership that Morgan's gonna talk a little bit about and give you guys an opportunity to ask questions about.
But really, I mean, this is, this is gonna help optimize from, you know, a search perspective.
It's gonna make sure that your Google Business page is on point.
It's gonna take um a requirement off of the marketing calendar for you guys.
That way you can focus on some of the other things that you're being asked to do from your daily social media, posting requirements to outreach, marketing and that sort of stuff.
So, um Morgan, I'm gonna turn it over to you.
I think it'd be great if you could give a little intro to everybody.
Tell them a little bit about yourself too before you kind of dive into everything.
Yes, of course.
Um Thank you.
I appreciate
the intro.
Um And good to see you again.
And for anyone else that I, I have seen before when doing the little uh thought presentation.
Good to see you.
Um Yeah, so I'm Morgan and I am the account manager for um all of the Tail Winds portfolio for every partnership um and product that we've kind of put together in the last few years.
Um So I've been at the company for about 3.5 years now and I've been on this um like customer success and account management, customer facing side, um this whole time.
Um I currently live in Madison, Wisconsin, so I'm not too far from where you guys are.
Um But I, I was living in Chicago and originally from Colorado, so I've kind of been everywhere.
Um Yeah, and I think where this partnership sort of takes us today.
And right now, uh like Devin said, we've been working together on the Ils and rentable side for a while.
So you guys have been um contracted to have your listings on our Ils um targeted social ads that we kind of rotate monthly for additional boost and lead volume.
And in the last couple of years, rentable has uh released this Google Business Pro product.
It started as just a one feature product.

It's now rolled into multiple features and it's definitely one of our stickiest products at the moment because it is sco focus and we know that not only is sco becoming really prominent today um in the market but also that it takes a while to build.
So the longer you have something running the better it's working.
Um And we, we wanted to create something that was a very easy set it and forget it type of product where you guys don't have anything to do on your end.

It's fully automated, but it's still working in the background to um really complete all the check boxes that Google is looking for when they rank your properties and when they send more traffic your way.
So we're playing Google's game.
Um, but we figured out how to do it pretty well so far.
And um, yeah, I'll, I'm happy to kind of take you through a quick overview of what the services are.

I'll show you a live example from uh a portfolio we've been working with for a while and then if you guys have any questions, I'm more than happy to answer um anything you're curious about or any technical questions that you might have as well.
All right, I'm gonna go ahead and get sharing.
Of course, I'm not a team's girl.
I'm a zoom girl.
So it might take me an extra second.
Get this up.
All right.
OK.
I know we're loading a little slow but give this a second.
All right.
Um So this page right here, I think this sort of gives a good overview behind the why, why we're doing this?
Why rentable is doing this?
Why you guys are taking this on?
Um We've learned that, you know, recently and always your Google business profile is if not more important, just as important as your website.

Um We've heard a lot in past conferences and summits for other um communities and other apartments that a lot of traffic that's coming from your website and Google specifically is typically the highest converting.
I, I don't know if that's the same with you guys.
I know it usually is.
Um and it can help perform a lot of I OS S even the big guys.
So, um I think that's a really big reason why we wanna make sure that your profile looks the best it can.
Um It's again checking the boxes that Google is looking for and you can see the in the statistics below that over half of the actions on your Google business listings are website visits.

So anything that we do to drive more traffic to your website visits, we know that because it's converting, that's going to give you the best chances of hitting your occupancy goals and just getting as much traffic directly to you as possible without having it rerouted from another ils or a different directory.
Um So yeah, o on top of that, we know that establishing social credibility with, um you know, where you guys are ranked and building trust on Google is super important.
Um um Again, you know, I'll kind of go through how we're playing Google's game and, and making this easier for you guys while also giving Google what they want.
Um But all of this is also going to help with this whole tie back to making your Google file look really similar to your website.

We're trying to give you a full circle experience where we can say, ok, if someone lands on your website, they can see what's available, what amenities you have, they can speak with um a chat bot that can actually send a lead and we're giving them the full experience as if they were on your website or they were on an I OS, so kind of adding an additional lead source um as well.
So the way that we're doing this, we have three products, um and I'll go through each one in a little more detail, but we have a posting product in one section of your profile.
We have a products feed that utilizes a totally different section.
And then we have a chat bot that we have created ourselves.
Um And part of what this chatbot can do is very industry first and um pretty cool and definitely my, my favorite part.
So
um the posting here is going to be on the bottom of your profile.
What we're doing is we have an A I tool that posts every single day on your profile.
So we know that this is hard to do on your own, but we also know that Google likes to see daily activity.
So we said, OK, then we'll post every single day.
Um We're pulling the information that is in your real page feed.
So if you list all of your amenities you have photos to match um and we can find those in your feed or on your rentable listing that's what information we're gonna pull over.
Um So Google, like I said, they're looking for frequency, they're also looking for relevancy.
So we wanna make these posts relevant to what you guys are selling on your Google business profile.
Um because they're looking to see that you're using keywords that are being searchable.
Um And that's something that we really prioritize in these postings.

They're never duplicated, but we make sure that we're always highlighting amenities in the descriptions because when someone is searching for in an apartment in, you know, Boston, for example, but they want specifically two bedrooms, dog friendly with a pool, we can pull those keywords out of the daily post that we're creating and help to boost your property uh exposure there.
The second piece of this is going to be the products feed this I think.
Um So we started our, our original product was just the postings.
Then we added this product's feed, which I think really skyrocketed.
Um Our audience that wanted to use this product because the products feed, it's a separate section than where the posts are.
So we're showing Google A, you're utilizing another piece of your profile and you're posting daily.
It's relevant content it's frequent.
But the nice piece for you guys is that we're pulling in your current pricing and availability um at the floor plan level.
So there's a couple other vendors that are able to post pricing and availability.
We're the only ones right now that are able to break this out by floor plan.
So if you have multiple floor plans of a certain bedroom type, um we're gonna be able to pull that through with the lowest price available for that
floor plan.
Um I know that kind of a mouthful.
So if you have questions about that, definitely ask me towards the end here.
But the reason that we have these is because again, we're trying to build into that second level of creating um a profile that looks like an I OS.
So if you're getting people that are directed to your website through this products feed, and they can see what you have available, what the price ranges are, what the floor plans look like.
There are a lot higher intent renters when they hit your website and there are a lot more likely to be truly interested in convertible leads.

And then the last piece here is going to be the chatbot.

It's created by rentable.

Um And they're gonna take that and they're gonna start continuing to raise you in rankings on Google.

So, what specials you have going on?
What's currently available?

Give a pool?

Can I get a hold of the property manager?

The nice piece.

Can I have your contact information, name, phone number, email?
Um We'll make sure the property is in contact with you ASAP and then we'll actually take the transcript of the chat bot and what was said?
And we'll send that directly into your CRM as a lead as a guest card.

But you guys are actually seeing a 6% increase in website traffic, a 6% increase in views.

This was a really good strategy um just to continue pushing against, you know, off seasons, weird seasons, COVID, seasons, whatever might happen.
